commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Paul encourages slaves to serve their earthy masters well, so that they may appear to them to deserve their freedom. A slave who did not do his work properly would blaspheme the name of Christ and do nothing to further God’s cause. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Not to say such a request as that (forsooth) their rivals-all the more "free "in that they are the "hand-maids "of Christ alone

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
